verses.text: Zan sialin ka lup kawmin, ka ngaihno ka lungngaingai a, amah ka zon' hangin ka mu zo kei hi
Tho-in khuasung tengah ka vak a, kongzing kawm tengah ka pai kawikawi a, ka ngaihno ka zong a, ka zon'zon' hangin ka mu zo kei hi
Khuasung cingin a pai kawikawite ka tuak a, “Ka ngaihno na mu uh hiam?” ci-in ka dong hi
Khuasung cingte tawh ka kikhen khit phetin ka ngaihno tawh ka kimu hi. Amah kawi-in ka lencip a, ka pian'na ka nu' inndei sung, ka nu' inn dong ka tun'pih mateng ka khah kei hi
Jerusalem nungakte aw, ko' kingaihna nong suknawi lohna dingun sakhi leh sanang tawh kei tungah hong kiciam un.
Myrrh paknamtui leh saledi pak namtui a kihel tawh a kibang, sumbuka paknamtui om khempeuh a kihal khin a khu tawh a kibang, gamlaka hong khuto henhan bang ahi hiam
En un, Solomon kumpi luai-in hong kizawng! Israel gamsunga om galkap hoihpen galkap sawmguk in amah cing hi
A vekpi-in namsau zat a siam vive hi a, galdo a siam vive hi khin uh hi. A vekpi-in namsau kuah kim uh a, mi' hihkhak ding a cing uh hi
Sing hoihpen tawh a kibawl luai-in Kumpi Solomon hong kizawng hi
A luai khuamte, ngun tawh kizut a, a tungah kham tawh a kizem puan a kilam hi. A tutna dingin puansan kibawl a, a sungah savun kidap hi
Jerusalem nungakte aw, hong pai un la, Kumpi Solomon en dih ve un. A zi neih ni, a lungdam ni-a, a nu in amah a khuksak Kumpi lukhu hong khu hi.
